REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS ALAN BUCKLEY AND DANIELLE JACKSON'S NOTICE OF RESCHEDULED HEARING ON SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 28, 2023 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY SEEKS TO STRIKE "THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFFS." MOVING PARTY FAILED TO CARRY ITS BURDEN AND SHOW THAT CLAIMS ASSERTED IN THE COMPLAINT (NOT IDENTIFIED IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION) ARISE OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY OR THAT THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT ARISES OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; COURT REPORTER: JANE HONG, CSR #11975, CSRJANE@HOTMAIL.COM, 909-831-2644. (D501)

Notice Of Rescheduled Hearing On Special Motion To Strike ) Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jamie C. Couche; Anderson Poole & Couche, P.C.; 415-956-6413; appearing for defendants Alan Buckley and Danielle Jackson.

No other appearances. Defendants contest the court's tentative ruling. Mr. Couche requests that the court take the matter under submission for review of the Bonnie case (see reporter's transcript for citation), and also requests a statement of decision. The court denies defendants' request for a statement of decision. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is DENIED. Moving party seeks to strike "the complaint filed by plaintiffs." Moving party failed to carry its burden and show that claims asserted in the complaint (not identified in the Notice of Motion) arise out of protected activity or that the entire complaint arises out of protected activity.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Jane Hong, CSR #11975, CSRJane@hotmail.com, 909-831-2644. (D501)
